text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna and I are heading home just<n>a little late
after enjoying our day out,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: My senses are tingling...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I sense the presence of students.<n>Two... no, three
of them?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
They shouldn't be out at this hour...<n>It's way
past curfew.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As soon as she says that, she<n>dashes off into
the night.
choice_data_list: (Which is worrying. It is late, after all...)
(Which is worrying. It is late, after all...)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I decide to wait until Tazuna returns<n>so I can see
her home.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, I stay by the school<n>gates
until...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! How'd ya get so darn fast,<n>Tazuna?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
That's enough from you, Taiki<n>Shuttle! Return to
your dorm right this<n>instant!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Nooooo!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Ugh! You're not getting away that<n>easily!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hyah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Even as a trainer, I have to say<n>Tazuna's
acceleration is<n>extraordinary!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: What?! Trainer! You waited this whole<n>time?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh... Th-thank you.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Um, am I imagining things, or... are you<n>eyes
glistening?
choice_data_list: Tell me, Tazuna, what is it you dream of?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
My dream?! Well... It's for the<n>Umamusume to
grow up healthy and<n>for the races to continue
improving for<n>many years to come...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer...
choice_data_list: What do you think about debuting as a racer?!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Now, wait just one minute! You need<n>to get a
hold of yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna gives my head a light tap, and<n>I snap
back to reality.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, <username>! You gave me a<n>quite a
shock.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: I mean, really. Debuting...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪
